aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
- **Zigbee Light Sensor ZG-106Z**: Requested by [johnx1971](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/165). No new fingerprints identified.
- **Zigbee Human Presence Sensor (zy-zhps01-24g)**: Requested by [TeejooK](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1355). No new fingerprints identified.

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**: Supported for `switch_3gang` (Issue #170).
- **_TZE284_hdml1aav**: Supported for `soil_sensor` (Issue #176).
- **_TZE284_oitavov2**: Supported for `soil_sensor` (Issue #178).
- **_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v**: Supported for `fingerbot` (Issue #161).
- **_TZ3000_otvn3lne**: Supported for `motion_sensor` (Issue #164).
- **_TZ3000_7y90pany**: Supported for `climate_sensor` (Issue #165).
- **_TZ3000_xabckq1v**: Supported for `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_2` (Fork Issue #1356).
- **_TZ3000_wkai4ga5**: Supported for `button_wireless_4`, `scene_switch_4`, `wall_remote_4_gang_3` (Fork Issue #1356).
- **_TZE204_bvfld3xc**: Supported for `presence_sensor_radar` (Fork Issue #1355).

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
Currently, there are no new fingerprints from forks identified for integration.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **[Fix presence_sensor_radar pairing for DP-only TS0601 devices](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/180)** by Robsta86: Addresses pairing issues for fingerprints `_TZE204_sxm7l9xa` and `_TZE204_qasjif9e`. (Closed, not merged)
   
2. **[Added TS110E driver](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)** by PiTRiS87: Introduces support for fingerprints `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia` and `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`. (Open)

3. **[Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1166)** by chernals: Adds support for fingerprint `_TZ3000_c8ozah8n`. (Closed, not merged)

4. **[Added 3 new devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)** by Peter-Celica: Introduces fingerprints `_TZE200_pay2byax` and `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`. (Open)

5. **[Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)** by Melectro1: Updates for fingerprint `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`. (Open)

6. **[Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)** by Melectro1: Updates for fingerprint `_TZE204_dapwryy7`. (Open)

7. **[Add "_TZE204_bjzrowv2" - Update app.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)** by YuriEstevan: Introduces fingerprint `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`. (Open)

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee project, highlighting device requests, supported fingerprints, and significant pull requests that could enhance the functionality of the integration.
